## AI Video Creator v1.0.11

### Setup Hub — all-in-one tool installer (desktop)

This release ships the full **Setup Hub** in the Windows installer: environment scan, managed addons, and one-click tool install.

**Setup Hub panel** (top of workspace)
- Scan Python, GPU, pipeline, ffmpeg, Git, Node.js, and optional WSL
- **Scan missing tools** — built-in addon scanner with fix checklist
- **Install all tools** — runs the full install protocol in order
- **Update all addons** — Git, Node.js, Python embed, venv, Open-Sora clone, requirements sync, pip/torch, FFmpeg, models, WSL
- **Apply maxed profile** — links managed paths to Director + GPU auto-run
- Auto-update toggle runs after each environment scan

**Managed addons** (under `%APPDATA%\AI Video Creator\addons\`)
- No external `E:\Open-Sora` path required — everything lives in AppData
- `requirements.txt` auto-synced from bundled template + Open-Sora deps
- All pip installs forced through managed venv (`forceVenvForPip`)

**CLI** (for power users / CI)
- `npm run tools:scan` — missing tool report
- `npm run tools:install` — full protocol install
- `npm run tools:protocol` — install order and rules

### Packaging
- Setup Hub backend scripts, manifests, and WSL bootstrap included in Electron `build.files`
- Sidebar **Setup Hub** quick jump added for desktop discoverability

Existing installs should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.

## Test plan

- [ ] Open app → Setup Hub visible at top + sidebar jump
- [ ] Scan environment → module grid + missing checklist
- [ ] Scan missing tools → 10 addon rows (Git, Node, Python, venv, Open-Sora, …)
- [ ] Install all tools (or Update all addons) on clean machine
- [ ] Apply maxed profile → Director pipeline + Python paths set
- [ ] Check for updates → v1.0.11
